publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-01-12 06:26:21 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: This collection contains ephemera covering a broad variety of topics relating to Native Americans.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: This collection contains ephemera covering a broad variety of topics. Brochures, correspondence, programs from events, theses manuscripts, monographs, maps, music, photographs, plays, postcards, reprints, publications, small books, and government bills and statements, are included organized by subject. Collection was established as a catch all for items pertaining to Indians that were collected by staff of the Huntington Free Library. Collection contains a vast range of reference material, that covers anthropology, archaeology, culture, education, politics, and many other Native American topics. Collection also provides history on various locations and cities. Many unique, author signed and annotated, and privately printed items. In some cases the collection contains information about the aquisition of objects that now may reside at the National Museum of the American Indian.

odd.head: NOTES
odd.p: Only a fraction of the actual subject headings are given in the record; see the guide for the complete listing.
Forms part of the Native American Collection. (NAC)
See also the Native American artist vertical file, #9241, Native American biography vertical file, #9242, and Native American publications vertical file, #9246.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Native American subject vertical file, #9205. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Codex Xolotl, Histoire Chichimeque. Includes photostats.

did.unittitle: Backlash Includes Southern Poverty Law Center, Militias, KKK
